title: happi overlay
description: A vanilla overlay pack that brings many "happi :D" textures and make your day! HAPPI :D
body:
### A pack to remind you to be happi and stay wholesome :D

## Note

Latest release of the pack should always work in the listed versions; have not tested on older versions, so feel free to test them out for me :)  

## Features

"happi :D" splash text + lang file tweaks
![Title Screen + Splash Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4d38e91b63faa5e1af6ea28d45fe2cda7204041.jpeg)

":D" crosshair
![:D Crosshair](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55637d74d338cf4e2f69f3cc283f4a7965db9e9f.jpeg)

":D" totem particles
![:D Totem Particles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b23ad59b1e45e48fcd4b0572e84ed8d00090ebcc.jpeg)

Language file tweak  
![Changed names for some advancements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce7d3d5b2b43e66ecb352d13722e2ed1a29cdf02.jpeg)
